sidebar.behavior: persistent on desktop, collapsible on tablet

rules.errorState: Border becomes red, triggers 4px gap to helper text

ui_primitives.name: Radix UI
ui_primitives.usage: Headless accessible foundations for selects, dropdowns, and dialogs.

variants.name: class-variance-authority (cva)
variants.usage: Perfect for mapping EOS's strict Button and Input states (Enabled, Hover, Pressed).

class_merge.name: tailwind-merge & clsx
class_merge.usage: Safely combining utility classes without conflicts.

animations.name: Motion
animations.usage: Handling the 'Processing' spinner transitions and sidebar collapse animations.

avoid: Using arbitrary h-12 sizes for forms (MUST be 56px / h-[56px])
Using non-standard button heights (MUST be 40px / h-10)
Inventing random padding values (MUST stick to 4px/8px scale)
enforce: Wrap icons in explicit sizing containers (w-5 h-5)
Use cva to handle the specific EOS visual states
Ensure all inputs show label and placeholder correctly centered vertically within the 56px height
